title: DeveloperTaskPacket
description: STORY-032.1: the envelope the Supervisor composes (029.2) and sends to the Developer. Validated on compose and on receive. Facts and scope only — never another agent's reasoning.

packet_id.description: Unique id of this task packet.

story_contract_ref.description: Pointer to the story contract this packet renders.

task_title.description: Short human-readable title of the task.

task_goal.description: The objective: what 'done' means for this packet.

task_details.description: Background and behavioral expectations (no reasoning carried).

background.description: Context prose, incl. failure-bank AVOID warnings.

allowed_write_set.description: The ONLY paths the Developer may write — enforced before apply.

forbidden_actions.description: Hard prohibitions (secrets, sudo, weakening tests, out-of-write-set).

required_files.description: Files to create/update and do-not-touch guardrails.

validation_commands.description: Commands the Validator runs to judge pass/fail.

acceptance_criteria.description: Testable behaviors that define completion (authored by Planning/Assessor, NOT the Developer).

context_packet.description: Refs to include and patterns to exclude from context (no raw transcripts).

output_required.description: Artifacts the Developer turn must return (patch proposal, tests, rollback notes…).
